title: Smoky Fluffy Haddock Stir-fry
description: A spicy low-carb-friendly meal-prep dish featuring sous-vide smoked haddock in a fragrant blend of vegetables and spices.
instructions: Remove the smoked haddock from the bag and pat dry with paper towels. Season both sides with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat until very hot, then add the seasoned smoked haddock. Fry for about 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
In another pan heated with 1 more tablespoon of oil, sauté minced garlic and sliced red chillies until fragrant.
Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sriracha to the garlic and chilli mixture. Stir well until smooth.
Push aside the fried haddock to one side in a plate or bowl. Add fresh cilantro leaves to the pan. Pour the sauce over the cilantro before adding back the haddock for about 30 seconds.
Serve hot with steamed vegetables or rice if desired.
